name: Apricot-Cardamom Bars
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------APRICOT ICING-------------------------------
1/2 c Powdered sugar
3 ts Apricot nectar
-OR- Orange juice
In a medium mixing bowl stir together flour, brown sugar, baking powder,
baking soda, and cardamom or cloves; set aside. Stir together apricot
nectar or orange juice, applesauce, oil, and egg until combined. Add to
dry ingredients, stirring until just combined. Stir in the snipped
apricots.
Spread batter into an ungreased 11 x 7 x 1-1/2-inch baking pan. Bake in a
350°F oven for about 25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean. Cool in pan on a wire rack. Drizzle with Apricot Icing. Cut into bars.
Apricot Icing: In a small mixing bowl, stir together 2 to 3 teaspoons apricot nectar or orange juice.
